## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Ubuntu]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17]
- Node version: [e.g. 18.x]
